ready_semantics: READY means the metric was executed against current inputs and validated (numerator/denominator/pct computed or explicitly unavailable fields set). Code existence alone never yields READY.
not_ready_semantics: NOT_READY means the metric could not be computed from available inputs (missing session, incomplete sample, entity-level gap, etc.).
blocked_semantics: BLOCKED means computation is impeded by an external or technical dependency (credentials, network, missing source access).

items.label: Entities with recent commercial signal
items.definition: Count of universe entities that have ≥1 matched opportunity in OPEN/UPCOMING/RECENT commercial statuses. Commercial signal only — never labeled coverage.
items.formula: entities with ≥1 OPEN/UPCOMING/RECENT matched opportunity / canonical_universe_denominator
items.denominator_policy: Fixed canonical universe size from load_canonical_universe / seed / FIXED_CANONICAL_DENOMINATOR (1093); never reduced to inflate percentages.
items.as_of_policy: Report-level `as_of` (ISO date) on CoverageContractReport; metric values are interpreted at that cut date.
items.source_policy: session coverage_canonical commercial_entity_ids and/or PostgreSQL opportunity matches reconciled to universe entities.
items.notes: NOT a coverage metric. Renamed from commercial_opportunity_any. Do not label this as 'coverage'.

items.label: Source mapping coverage
items.definition: Share of universe entities with an explicit entity_source_registry record (including status=source_not_identified).
items.formula: entities with explicit source registry record (including status=source_not_identified) / denominator
items.denominator_policy: Fixed canonical universe size from load_canonical_universe / seed / FIXED_CANONICAL_DENOMINATOR (1093); never reduced to inflate percentages.
items.as_of_policy: Report-level `as_of` (ISO date) on CoverageContractReport; metric values are interpreted at that cut date.
items.notes: Target 100%. Registry may mark source_not_identified — that still counts as mapped.

items.label: Operational source coverage
items.definition: Share of universe entities with ≥1 official source that completed all operational pipeline stages (mapped→recent_evidence) within SLA.
items.formula: entities with ≥1 official source: mapped + accessible + collected + normalized + reconciled + verified within SLA + recent evidence / denominator
items.denominator_policy: Fixed canonical universe size from load_canonical_universe / seed / FIXED_CANONICAL_DENOMINATOR (1093); never reduced to inflate percentages.
items.as_of_policy: Report-level `as_of` (ISO date) on CoverageContractReport; metric values are interpreted at that cut date.
items.source_policy: entity_source_registry operational stages + provenance (run_id, raw, hash, normalized, reconciliation).
items.notes: Target 95%. Requires full operational pipeline stages.

items.label: Freshness coverage
items.definition: Share of universe entities whose last verification is within the applicable SLA window from config/coverage_slas.yaml.
items.formula: entities verified within applicable SLA / denominator
items.denominator_policy: Fixed canonical universe size from load_canonical_universe / seed / FIXED_CANONICAL_DENOMINATOR (1093); never reduced to inflate percentages.
items.as_of_policy: Report-level `as_of` (ISO date) on CoverageContractReport; metric values are interpreted at that cut date.
items.source_policy: entity-level last_seen_at / coverage_evidence.observed_at; source-level freshness_manifest alone is insufficient.

items.label: Opportunity recall
items.definition: Recall of relevant opportunities against an independent stratified gold sample — never inferred from raw DB opportunity counts.
items.formula: true positives in stratified benchmark sample / sample positives
items.denominator_policy: Sample positives in the stratified gold benchmark (not universe size).
items.as_of_policy: Report-level `as_of` (ISO date) on CoverageContractReport; metric values are interpreted at that cut date. Sample version/date must be recorded in limitations.
items.notes: Computed from stratified benchmark sample ONLY. Never derived from database opportunity counts.

items.label: Required field completeness
items.definition: Mean completeness of decision fields across scored opportunity records; absence is explicit (missing ≠ invented zero).
items.formula: mean over opportunities of (present decision fields / 17 decision fields); absence is explicit
items.denominator_policy: 17 decision fields per opportunity record (field-level); report also records universe context separately.
items.as_of_policy: Report-level `as_of` (ISO date) on CoverageContractReport; metric values are interpreted at that cut date.
items.source_policy: scored opportunity records from commercial/session pipeline.
items.notes: Decision fields listed in DECISION_FIELDS. Missing fields are explicit absences.
